title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates family as a Curriculum Developer in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates:
Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates!
